nodes.label: Tests for tools/image_generation_tool.py — FAL multi-model support.  Covers the
Fresh import of tools.image_generation_tool per test.
Every FAL_MODELS entry must have a consistent shape.
Upscaling should default to False for all new models to preserve         the <1s
Flux, z-image, qwen, recraft, ideogram all use preset enum sizes.
Nano-banana uses aspect_ratio enum, NOT image_size.
GPT Image 2 uses preset enum sizes (not literal strings like 1.5).     Mapped to
openai_api_key (BYOK) is deliberately not in supports — all users         route
No model should receive keys outside its `supports` set.
Model-level defaults should carry through unless overridden.
None values from caller should be ignored (use default).
GPT-Image quality is baked into the FAL_MODELS defaults at 'medium'     and cann
Even if a user manually edits config.yaml and adds quality_setting,         the
quality is only meaningful for GPT-Image models (1.5, 2) — other         models
The honors_quality_setting flag was the old override trigger.         It must no
The _resolve_gpt_quality() helper was removed — quality is now         a static
The agent-facing schema must stay tight — model selection is a         user-leve
Status-code extraction should work across exception shapes.
4xx from the Nous managed gateway should be translated to a user-actionable mess
403 from managed gateway → ValueError mentioning FAL_KEY + mangaba tools.
500s are real outages, not model-availability issues — don't rewrite them.
When user has direct FAL_KEY (managed gateway returns None), raw         errors
